places.name: Rynek Underground
places.description: Beneath Kraków Old Town's main square lies a hologram-filled medieval market vampire graveyard wonderland.

places.name: The Bones of the Wawel Dragon
places.description: Real bones which are said to have belonged to a Polish dragon.

places.name: Wawel Dragon's Den
places.description: This Polish cave has housed a dragon, a brothel, and an enduring legend.

places.name: Collegium Maius
places.description: Poland's oldest surviving university building holds a wealth of historic science instruments including some used by Copernicus.

places.name: St. Mary's Basilica
places.description: St. Mary's features one of the most spectacularly decorated cathedral interiors in all of Europe.

places.name: Kościuszko Mound
places.description: This man-made mound monument was built out of soil from all across the Polish empire.

places.name: Liban Quarry
places.description: The unsettling remnants of a torn down movie set lies nearby the ruined location of the actual Płaszów Labor Camp.

places.name: The Living Obwarzanek Museum (Żywe Muzeum Obwarzanka)
places.description: Learn the fine art of making a centuries-old treat at this hands-on food museum.
